{{Infobox group
| name = Magisters
| introduced = Of Sea and Shadow
}}

''See also: [[Magisters Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The Magisters are a prominent [[Guild]] categorized as an Imperialist organization, alongside the [[Blackwatch]], the [[Navigators]], and the [[Imperial Guard]]. While many members of the [[Guild]] are scholars and researchers, they have also cultivated trained killers to serve their interests. The Magisters are known for their ability to manipulate natural forces—such as fire, wind, and plant [[life]]—using specialized staves that act as tools for their potent [[Intent]]. This power allows them to perform feats like levitating objects, creating tornadoes, or burning structures from a distance. Their [[Intent]] is described as being significantly more intense and heat-like than that of ordinary people, though using it directly against certain [[Elder]] creations can be fatal. [[The Guild]] is led by a Head, a position held for a long time by [[Mekendi Maxeus]], an instructor at the [[Imperial]] Academy known for his controlled [[Intent]] and distinctive black mask. Following his death, the [[Guild]] has not appointed a successor, leaving its leadership status uncertain during periods of conflict. Members of the Magisters are often seen wearing distinctive robes and carrying unique staves, which can range from simple wood to being decorated with crystals or jewels. They maintain their own research journals and are capable of sensing things through advanced techniques, though they may not always have mastered these abilities. [[The Guild]] has also been involved in training specialized assassins and has a history of interacting with various other [[Imperial]] and [[Independent Guilds]].}}

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Magisters]] are a group capable of setting boats on fire from a distance.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c3">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Magisters]] is a guild with a [[Guild Head]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c14">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 14</ref>}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Magisters]] carry staves possessed of potent natural forces.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c14">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|The [[Magisters]] are a group that [[Albadol Crane]] once trained under.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c16">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 16</ref>}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|As members of the Imperialist alliance, the Magisters begin to gather in response to a growing sense that something is approaching. This group works toward the protection of the people and possesses the knowledge required to explain how [[Reading]] is utilized to [[Awaken]] stone. In preparation for what is coming, the Magisters are currently in the process of gathering weapons.}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Magisters]] are gathering because they sense something coming.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c6">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The [[Magisters]] are part of the Imperialist alliance.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c8">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The [[Magisters]] are a group working to protect the people.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c14">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Magisters]] can explain how [[Reading]] is used to [[Awaken]] stone.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c16">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|The [[Magisters]] are gathering weapons.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c18">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 18</ref>}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The [[Magisters]] spend their time trying to dredge up artifacts of a past they know nothing about.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c1">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 1</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|Many [[Magisters]] are present in the [[Imperial Palace]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c16">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The [[Magisters]] are one of the groups expected to attack [[Gray Island]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c17">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 17</ref>}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Magister]]’s [[Guild]] has not appointed a new Head since the death of [[Mekendi Maxeus]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c4">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|The [[Magisters]] wear robes and carry staves.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c6">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 6</ref>}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The Magisters possess the ability to collaborate on the construction of boxes designed to seal [[Vessels]] and can successfully hide their [[Intent]] from [[Reading]]. During a period of conflict, they functioned as part of an army engaged against [[Shera]] and [[Meia]], even unleashing their powers within the streets of the [[Imperial Palace]]. This group also stole pseudo-[[Gardeners]] who had been trained by [[Maxwell]]. To address various reports, they were included in a panel established by [[Calder]], though [[Darius]] had previously attempted to prevent [[Shera]] from killing members of their order.}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Magisters]] can collaborate on creating boxes to seal [[Vessels]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c4">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Magisters]] unleashed their powers in the streets of the [[Imperial Palace]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c8">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Magisters]] are part of an army facing [[Shera]] and [[Meia]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Magisters]] stole pseudo-[[Gardeners]] trained by [[Maxwell]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c10">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Magisters]] are part of a panel formed by [[Calder]] to counter reports.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c14">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Magisters]] can hide [[Intent]] from [[Reading]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c15">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Darius]] had previously tried to stop [[Shera]] from killing [[Magisters]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c23">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 23</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|“...Magisters gathering together. They’ve sensed something coming, they know the end is here.”<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c6" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Of Sea and Shadow]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Of Darkness and Dawn]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire groups]]
